options.systemMessage:
You are a competitive intelligence analyst specializing in detecting product launches from paid advertising signals.

Your job is to classify new terms appearing in competitor ad copy and determine whether the pattern constitutes a product launch signal.

Key rules:
- A new proper noun appearing in multiple ads simultaneously is almost certainly a product or feature name
- Technical terms and acronyms that are new are high-value signals
- Generic benefit language is usually low signal
- If the same new term appears in 3+ ads, the signal strength is likely High
- Consider the full ad copy context to understand what is being sold

For signal_detected: set true if at least one term is classified as product, feature, or represents a meaningful strategic shift. Set false if all terms are noise or generic benefits.

Return ONLY a raw JSON object. No markdown. No backticks. No code fences. No preamble. No explanation after. If you cannot determine a value use the string NA.

parameters.content:
# 🚀 New Product Launch Sniffer

## 🔍 How it works
Monitors competitor advertising activity to detect potential product launches. The workflow collects ad copy across multiple platforms, extracts new terms and messaging patterns, compares them against historical data, and uses AI to identify launch signals. Confirmed signals are logged, stored, and reported for ongoing competitive intelligence.

## ⚙️ How to set up
- [ ]  Connect Google Sheets credentials
- [ ]   Configure Adyntel API credentials
- [ ]   Add OpenAI credentials
 - [ ]  Populate competitor names and domains
- [ ]   Ensure required sheets exist (competitors, known_terms, launch_signals)
 - [ ]  Set competitor status to Pending
 - [ ]  Enable the weekly schedule trigger
- [ ]   Test with a small competitor list

🛠️ Customization
- Change scan frequency
- Add additional ad platforms
- Adjust term extraction rules
- Modify AI launch classification logic
- Add Slack, Email, or Discord notifications
- Store intelligence in Airtable, Notion, or a database

## 📅 Workflow Trigger & Competitor Processing

Purpose
Starts the workflow on schedule, loads competitors awaiting analysis, and processes each competitor individually to maintain clean and isolated results.

## 📢 Multi-Platform Ad Collection & Content Extraction

Purpose
Collects active advertisements from multiple platforms, extracts ad headlines and descriptions, removes duplicates, and prepares a unified content dataset for analysis.

## 🔍 Term Discovery & Signal Detection

Purpose
Compares current ad messaging against historical knowledge, identifies previously unseen terms, updates baseline intelligence, and determines whether meaningful launch signals exist.

## 🧠 AI Launch Analysis & Intelligence Reporting

Purpose
Uses AI to evaluate newly discovered terms, determines launch likelihood, stores confirmed intelligence, updates historical knowledge, sends alerts, marks processing complete, and continues the workflow for remaining competitors.
